response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio matches the provided lyrics and composition reference for the song 'All Alone With You' by ryo (supercell). 
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the provided reference lyrics for the singing portion of the video, and manually transcribed and translated the VTuber's opening speech.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the introductory speech accurately, included a subtitle for the prominent on-screen song title card during an instrumental transition, and mapped the singing sections precisely with zero cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 最後のお楽しみにということで。
subtitles.english: Please look forward to it at the end.

subtitles.original: それでは、次の曲聞いてください。
subtitles.english: With that, please listen to the next song.

subtitles.original: All Alone With You / 作詞・作曲：ryo (supercell)
subtitles.english: [Song: All Alone With You / Lyrics & Composition: ryo (supercell)]

subtitles.original: 誰かを愛することなんて 出来るわけなくって
subtitles.english: There's no way we could ever love someone else,

subtitles.original: だけど誰かに愛されたくて
subtitles.english: but we want someone to love us.

subtitles.original: 変わらない昨日がずっと続いたとしても
subtitles.english: Even if yesterday went on never changing,

subtitles.original: どこにも行けやしないんだ
subtitles.english: we can't go anywhere at all.

subtitles.original: 神さま どこへ行ってしまったの ねえ
subtitles.english: Lord in heaven, where have you gone? Please...

subtitles.original: 返事はなくて いつだってそうだよ
subtitles.english: ...there is no response, it's always like this.

subtitles.original: You'll never walk alone あなたと行く
subtitles.english: You'll never walk alone, I'll go with you.

subtitles.original: 歩いてくの あなたと二人で
こっちにきて 私に触れてキスをして
subtitles.english: Come here, touch me, and kiss me.

subtitles.original: もっとめちゃくちゃに したっていいんだよ
subtitles.english: It's okay for you to mess me up even more, you know?

subtitles.original: いつか誰もが死んじゃって 忘れられてくなら
subtitles.english: If everyone will die one day and be forgotten,

subtitles.original: 今確かなものだけを信じるわ
subtitles.english: right now, I'll believe only in something concrete.

subtitles.original: 神さま気取りの人が言うの
subtitles.english: Pretentious people who act like gods say...

subtitles.original: ねえ 人は強いって
I will stay with you あなたの手で
subtitles.english: I will stay with you, with your hands...

subtitles.original: その手が汚れてしまったとしても
subtitles.english: Even if your hands are stained beyond cleansing,

subtitles.original: You'll never walk alone あなたと行く
subtitles.english: You'll never walk alone, I'll go with you.

subtitles.original: 歩いてくの あなたと
